header.title: SEO Settings
header.subtitle: Manage all search engine optimization settings for your site

general.title: General Meta Tags
general.description: Basic SEO metadata shown in search results
general.siteTitleHint: Keep under 60 characters. This appears as the browser tab title and in search results.
general.titleSeparatorHint: Character that separates page title from site name in the browser tab.
general.metaDescriptionPlaceholder: A compelling description of your site...
general.metaDescriptionHint: Ideal length is 120–160 characters. Used as the snippet in Google search results.
general.metaKeywordsHint: Comma-separated keywords. Most modern search engines ignore this, but some still use it.
general.canonicalUrlHint: Tells search engines the preferred URL for this page to avoid duplicate content.
general.siteLanguageHint: Sets the lang attribute on your HTML element, helping search engines serve the right audience.

indexing.title: Indexing & Crawling
indexing.description: Control how search engine bots crawl your site
indexing.allowIndexingHint: When disabled, a noindex meta tag is added to all pages — search engines will not list your site.
indexing.followLinksHint: Adds follow/nofollow to links. Disabling tells bots not to pass SEO value through your outbound links.
indexing.indexImagesHint: Controls whether your images appear in Google Image Search results.
indexing.noArchiveHint: Adds noarchive — search engines won't store a cached version of your pages.
indexing.noSnippetHint: Adds nosnippet — Google will not show text snippets or video previews in search results.

openGraph.title: Open Graph (Facebook / LinkedIn)
openGraph.description: Control how your site looks when shared on social media
openGraph.ogTitleHint: Overrides the page title when shared on Facebook, LinkedIn, WhatsApp, etc.
openGraph.ogTypeHint: Describes the type of content — 'website' is fine for most pages.
openGraph.ogDescriptionHint: Shown below the title in social share previews. Aim for 100–200 characters.
openGraph.ogImageHint: Recommended size: 1200×630 px. This image appears in social share cards.
openGraph.ogLocaleHint: Tells Facebook the language and region of your content.

schema.title: Structured Data (Schema.org)
schema.description: Help search engines understand your business entity
schema.schemaTypeHint: The type that best describes your entity. 'Organization' works for most businesses.
schema.name: Name
schema.nameHint: Official name of your organization or personal brand.
schema.websiteUrlHint: The canonical URL of your website, used in the schema markup.
schema.logoUrlHint: Recommended: 112×112 px minimum. Used by Google Knowledge Panel.
schema.sameAsHint: One URL per line. Links to your official social profiles — helps Google associate them with your brand.

sitemap.title: XML Sitemap
sitemap.enableHint: Generates a sitemap.xml file that helps search engines discover all your pages.
sitemap.updateFrequencyHint: Hint to search engines about how often your content changes. 'Weekly' suits most blogs.
sitemap.defaultPriorityHint: A value from 0.0–1.0 indicating page importance relative to other pages on your site.
sitemap.includeImagesHint: Adds image URLs to the sitemap, helping Google Images discover your visual content.

robots.title: Robots.txt
robots.description: Control which parts of your site search engines can access
robots.contentHint: Use 'Disallow: /path/' to block specific directories. Always include your sitemap URL at the bottom.

analytics.title: Analytics & Tracking
analytics.gaIdHint: Paste your GA4 Measurement ID (G-XXXXXX) or Universal Analytics ID here.
analytics.gtmIdHint: Used to manage all your marketing and analytics tags from one place.
analytics.fbPixelHint: Tracks conversions from Facebook ads and enables retargeting audiences.
analytics.hotjarIdHint: Enables heatmaps and session recordings to understand user behavior.

performance.title: Performance & Technical SEO
performance.description: Speed and technical optimizations that affect rankings
performance.lazyLoadHint: Defers off-screen image loading, improving Core Web Vitals (LCP, CLS) and page speed scores.
performance.preloadFontsHint: Adds <link rel='preload'> for fonts, reducing render-blocking and improving FCP.
performance.minifyHtmlHint: Removes unnecessary whitespace from HTML output, slightly reducing page size.
performance.hreflangHint: Adds hreflang annotations to tell Google which language/region each page targets — essential for multilingual sites.
performance.ampHint: Generates Accelerated Mobile Pages versions of your content for faster mobile loading.

security.title: Security & HTTPS
security.description: Security settings that affect SEO trust signals
security.sslForceHint: Redirects all HTTP traffic to HTTPS. HTTPS is a confirmed Google ranking signal — always keep this on.
security.hstsHint: Tells browsers to only ever connect via HTTPS, even if the user types http://. Adds an extra security layer.
security.cspHint: Defines which sources of scripts, styles, and media are trusted. Reduces XSS risk but requires careful configuration.

images.title: Post Images
images.dropzone: Drag & drop images here, or click to upload

seo.title: SEO Settings
seo.previewTitle: How to Create a Successful Ecommerce Store
seo.previewDescription: Learn how to launch and grow a successful ecommerce business with practical strategies and tools.

attributesPage.pageDescription: Define variant attributes like color and size, then manage their values for SKU generation.
attributesPage.emptyDescription: Create your first attribute to start building product variants.
attributesPage.selectAttributeHint: Choose an attribute from the list or create a new one.
attributesPage.valuesDescription: Values become variant options when creating products (e.g. Red, Blue, Large).
attributesPage.deleteAttributeConfirm: This will remove the attribute and all its values. Products using it may be affected.
attributesPage.deleteValueConfirm: Remove this value from the attribute?
attributesPage.addValuePlaceholder: Type a value and press Enter
attributesPage.noValuesHint: Add values like Red, Blue, or Large to enable product variants.
attributesPage.saveFailed: Could not save changes. Please try again.

brandsPage.pageDescription: Manage product brands used when creating and organizing catalog items.
brandsPage.saveFailed: Could not save brand. Please try again.
brandsPage.deleteDescription: This brand will be removed from the catalog. Products using it may need to be updated.

information.title: Product Information
information.slugHelper: URL-friendly identifier. Auto-generated from name if left empty.

organization.title: Product Organization
organization.featuredHelper: Show this product in featured sections on the storefront.

pricing.title: Pricing & Inventory
pricing.skuHelper: SKU codes are generated automatically when the product is saved. Add variant attributes (e.g. Color, Size) below to create multiple SKUs.
pricing.skuVariantHint: {count} attribute(s) selected — multiple SKU combinations will be created.
pricing.lowStockThresholdHelper: Alert when quantity falls at or below this number.

attributes.title: Product Attributes
attributes.subtitle: Select catalog attributes and values to generate SKU variants.
attributes.noValues: No values defined for this attribute in catalog settings.
attributes.emptyCatalog: No catalog attributes found. Create attributes in Product Settings first.
attributes.valuesRequired: Select at least one value for each added attribute.

images.title: Product Images
images.dropzone: Drag & drop images here, or click to upload
images.uploadFailed: Failed to upload image. Please try again.
